summary: Completed testing of Reposición v2 module (Pool Capping + Tallado). Backend: 15/15 tests pass (100%). Frontend: All new features verified - Hilo column, Tallado column, updated KPIs (con_asignacion, sin_stock), opacity-50 for zero-qty rows, drilldown with distribution.

issues: React hydration warnings in console (span inside table elements) - cosmetic, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: Backend: Item structure includes NEW 'hilo' field
Backend: Item structure includes NEW 'tallado_destino' field
Backend: KPIs include NEW 'con_asignacion' count
Backend: KPIs include NEW 'sin_stock' count
Backend: qty_sugerida never exceeds stock_almacen for individual item (per-item cap)
Backend: Pool cap across destinations - sum(qty_sugerida) <= stock_almacen for same SKU
Backend: Limited stock allocation - when stock=1, only 1 dest gets qty=1, others get 0
Backend: Zero-qty items have motivo containing 'Sin stock para asignar'
Backend: ELEMENT PREMIUM shows correct destinations (GAMARRA 209, GM218, GRAU 238)
Backend: Tallado (assortment) is computed for priority sorting
Backend: QEPO filter shows only BOOSH and GAMARRA 207 as destinations
Backend: reposicion-detalle endpoint accepts hilo parameter
Backend: solo_objetivo=true limits destinations to brand targets
Backend: solo_objetivo=false shows all 5 stores as destinations
Frontend: Login and navigate to Stock Dashboard > Reposición tab works
Frontend: Table shows all 15 columns including Hilo (column 6) and Tall (column 14)
Frontend: KPIs show: Faltantes, Con asig, Qty, ALMACEN icon, Store icon, Warning icon
Frontend: Rows with qty=0 appear with reduced opacity (opacity-50 class)
Frontend: Click row expands drilldown showing 'DISTRIBUCIÓN POR TIENDA' with stock per store
Frontend: Drilldown shows suggestion badge (ALMACEN → DEST: N uds)
Frontend: QEPO filter correctly shows only BOOSH and GAMARRA 207 destinations
critical_code_review_comments: Pool capping implementation is CORRECT: qty_sugerida never exceeds stock_almacen per item, and sum across destinations respects global pool
Tallado (COUNT DISTINCT color,talla per store per ITEM_BASE) is computed and used in _sort_dests_by_priority
ELEMENT PREMIUM competition: GAMARRA 209 vs GRAU 238 sorted by tallado, winner gets first allocation
SKU key now includes 'hilo' field: (marca, tipo, entalle, tela, hilo, color, talla)
Zero-qty items correctly show motivo='Sin stock para asignar' with origin='-' when no source available
React hydration warnings (span in table) are cosmetic and don't affect functionality - caused by dynamic content wrapping
seed_data_creation: None - used existing PostgreSQL data (real stock data)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reposición v2 module fully tested. NEW FEATURES: (1) 'hilo' field in item structure and SKU key, (2) 'tallado_destino' field for assortment count, (3) KPIs 'con_asignacion' and 'sin_stock', (4) Pool capping - sum(qty_sugerida) across destinations never exceeds stock_almacen. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_reposicion_v2.py covers pool capping, tallado, zero-qty items, brand filters. Frontend uses opacity-50 class for zero-qty rows. All data-testids working correctly.
